stages.label: Apply Supabase schema
stages.detail: Set SUPABASE_DB_URL to the Supabase project Postgres connection string, for example postgresql://postgres:<password>@db.<ref>.supabase.co:5432/postgres.

stages.label: Verify account auth redirect
stages.detail: Supabase auth is blocked by VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, VITE_SUPABASE_URL.

stages.label: Seed account, proof and leaderboard rows
stages.detail: 6/6 Supabase target env keys collected; waiting for write prerequisites.

stages.label: Verify Supabase read-back
stages.detail: Verify public REST reads, target rows, share artifacts and global/friend/season leaderboard scopes.

checklist.label: Create or select Supabase project
checklist.detail: Create a hosted Supabase project, then copy its project URL and database connection string.
checklist.action: Open Supabase dashboard, create a project, then fill VITE_SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_DB_URL.

checklist.label: Copy project API and database keys
checklist.detail: Browser code uses only the project URL and anon key; schema apply and production seed use local-only database/service role secrets.
checklist.action: Fill the missing Supabase keys in .env.production.local.

checklist.label: Allow deployed OAuth and magic-link redirect
checklist.detail: Add https://olive8882-1996.github.io/kickoff-lock-agent/ to Supabase Auth redirect allow-list.
checklist.action: Set VITE_SUPABASE_REDIRECT_URL to VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL and allow-list it in Supabase.

checklist.label: Apply production tables, RLS, storage and views
checklist.detail: Applies kickoff_profiles, records, mode runs, share artifacts, kickoff_leaderboard, backend health, RLS and Storage policy contract.
checklist.action: Set SUPABASE_DB_URL first, then run bun run supabase:schema:check.

checklist.label: Publish browser runtime config
checklist.command: bun run runtime:config && bun run deploy:pages
checklist.detail: Writes public/runtime-config.js without leaking service-role or database secrets, then publishes it with the app.
checklist.action: Set deployed Supabase browser keys and the deployed auth redirect before publishing runtime config.

checklist.label: Upload record and mode share-card images
checklist.command: bun run share:upload-image && bun run share:upload-image -- --kind=mode --file=public/generated/kickoff-production-mode-share.png
checklist.detail: Uploads production PNG share cards to the public kickoff-share-cards bucket and records public URL/hash read-back evidence.
checklist.action: Set the deployed Supabase URL, service-role key and share image targets before upload.

checklist.label: Seed profile, proof, modes, shares and leaderboard rows
checklist.detail: Creates the Auth-bound production profile, prediction proof row, required mode proof rows, share artifacts and leaderboard scope evidence.
checklist.action: Complete Supabase keys and share image URLs first.

checklist.label: Prove Supabase read-back
checklist.detail: Verifies Auth target user, backend health, public target rows, share artifacts/channels and global/friend/season leaderboard scopes.
checklist.action: Collect KICKOFF_VERIFY_* targets, then run doctor:supabase.

setup.nextAction: Open Supabase dashboard, create a project, then fill VITE_SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_DB_URL.
setup.copyText:
Kickoff Lock Agent Supabase setup packet
Ready: no
Project ref: missing
Redirect URL: https://olive8882-1996.github.io/kickoff-lock-agent/
Next action: Open Supabase dashboard, create a project, then fill VITE_SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_DB_URL.
Env template:
VITE_SUPABASE_URL=
VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=
VITE_SUPABASE_REDIRECT_URL=https://olive8882-1996.github.io/kickoff-lock-agent/
VITE_SUPABASE_SHARE_BUCKET=kickoff-share-cards
SUPABASE_DB_URL=
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=
VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL=https://olive8882-1996.github.io/kickoff-lock-agent/
Checklist:
- Create or select Supabase project [blocked]
  url: https://supabase.com/dashboard/projects
  missing: Supabase project ref
  action: Open Supabase dashboard, create a project, then fill VITE_SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_DB_URL.
- Copy project API and database keys [blocked]
  missing: VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_DB_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
  action: Fill the missing Supabase keys in .env.production.local.
- Allow deployed OAuth and magic-link redirect [blocked]
  missing: VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, VITE_SUPABASE_URL
  action: Set VITE_SUPABASE_REDIRECT_URL to VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL and allow-list it in Supabase.
- Apply production tables, RLS, storage and views [blocked]
  command: bun run supabase:schema:apply
  missing: SUPABASE_DB_URL
  action: Set SUPABASE_DB_URL first, then run bun run supabase:schema:check.
- Publish browser runtime config [blocked]
  command: bun run runtime:config && bun run deploy:pages
  missing: VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
  action: Set deployed Supabase browser keys and the deployed auth redirect before publishing runtime config.
- Upload record and mode share-card images [blocked]
  command: bun run share:upload-image && bun run share:upload-image -- --kind=mode --file=public/generated/kickoff-production-mode-share.png
  missing: VITE_SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
  action: Set the deployed Supabase URL, service-role key and share image targets before upload.
- Seed profile, proof, modes, shares and leaderboard rows [blocked]
  command: bun run seed:production-targets --upload-share-image --upload-mode-share-image
  missing: VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, VITE_SUPABASE_URL
  action: Complete Supabase keys and share image URLs first.
- Prove Supabase read-back [blocked]
  command: bun run doctor:supabase
  missing: VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, VITE_SUPABASE_URL
  action: Collect KICKOFF_VERIFY_* targets, then run doctor:supabase.

authReadBackCommand.label: Auth admin user
authReadBackCommand.command: Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY and KICKOFF_VERIFY_USER_ID before reading the Auth user.

readBackCommands.label: Profile row
readBackCommands.command: Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY before reading kickoff_profiles?select=id,email,display_name,location,friend_code,season_key,updated_at&id=eq.kickoff-production-seed&limit=1

readBackCommands.label: Prediction row
readBackCommands.command: Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY before reading kickoff_records?select=id,user_id,season_key,friend_code,total_score&id=eq.cap-prod-73dc2618d1f9&user_id=eq.kickoff-production-seed&friend_code=eq.chengdu&season_key=eq.world-cup-run&limit=1

readBackCommands.label: Mode proof rows
readBackCommands.command: Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY before reading kickoff_mode_runs?select=id,user_id,mode_id,status,score,season_key,friend_code&id=in.(mode-prod-bracket-f90d6276,mode-prod-parlay-77bf4ef2,mode-prod-agent-vs-human-f8b27b3a,mode-prod-upset-9f6dd619,mode-prod-group-path-b533c118)&user_id=eq.kickoff-production-seed&friend_code=eq.chengdu&season_key=eq.world-cup-run&limit=5

readBackCommands.label: Record share artifact row
readBackCommands.command: Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY before reading kickoff_share_artifacts?select=id,user_id,season_key,friend_code,kind,image_url,image_hash,proof_url&id=eq.cap-prod-73dc2618d1f9&kind=eq.record&user_id=eq.kickoff-production-seed&friend_code=eq.chengdu&season_key=eq.world-cup-run&limit=1

readBackCommands.label: Mode share artifact rows
readBackCommands.command: Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY before reading kickoff_share_artifacts?select=id,user_id,season_key,friend_code,kind,image_url,image_hash,proof_url&id=in.(mode-prod-bracket-f90d6276,mode-prod-parlay-77bf4ef2,mode-prod-agent-vs-human-f8b27b3a,mode-prod-upset-9f6dd619,mode-prod-group-path-b533c118)&kind=eq.mode&user_id=eq.kickoff-production-seed&friend_code=eq.chengdu&season_key=eq.world-cup-run&limit=5

readBackCommands.label: Global leaderboard
readBackCommands.command: Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY before reading kickoff_leaderboard?select=id,display_name,location,friend_code,season_key,locks,revealed,average_score,best_score,xp,streak,exact_hits,verified_proofs,mode_proofs,global_rank,friend_rank,season_rank,rank,updated_at&order=xp.desc&id=eq.kickoff-production-seed&limit=1

readBackCommands.label: Friend leaderboard
readBackCommands.command: Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY before reading kickoff_leaderboard?select=id,display_name,location,friend_code,season_key,locks,revealed,average_score,best_score,xp,streak,exact_hits,verified_proofs,mode_proofs,global_rank,friend_rank,season_rank,rank,updated_at&order=xp.desc&id=eq.kickoff-production-seed&friend_code=eq.chengdu&limit=1

readBackCommands.label: Season leaderboard
readBackCommands.command: Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY before reading kickoff_leaderboard?select=id,display_name,location,friend_code,season_key,locks,revealed,average_score,best_score,xp,streak,exact_hits,verified_proofs,mode_proofs,global_rank,friend_rank,season_rank,rank,updated_at&order=xp.desc&id=eq.kickoff-production-seed&season_key=eq.world-cup-run&limit=1

nextAction: Apply Supabase schema: set SUPABASE_DB_URL first.
copyText:
Kickoff Lock Agent Supabase production bootstrap
Mode: plan
Stages: 0/4 ready or done
Missing env: SUPABASE_DB_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, VITE_SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
Next action: Apply Supabase schema: set SUPABASE_DB_URL first.
Commands:
- bun run supabase:schema:check
- bun run runtime:config:check
- bun run seed:production-targets --dry-run
- bun run doctor:supabase
Supabase Auth admin read-back command:
- Auth admin user: Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY and KICKOFF_VERIFY_USER_ID before reading the Auth user.
Anonymous Supabase read-back commands:
- Profile row: Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY before reading kickoff_profiles?select=id,email,display_name,location,friend_code,season_key,updated_at&id=eq.kickoff-production-seed&limit=1
- Prediction row: Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY before reading kickoff_records?select=id,user_id,season_key,friend_code,total_score&id=eq.cap-prod-73dc2618d1f9&user_id=eq.kickoff-production-seed&friend_code=eq.chengdu&season_key=eq.world-cup-run&limit=1
- Mode proof rows: Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY before reading kickoff_mode_runs?select=id,user_id,mode_id,status,score,season_key,friend_code&id=in.(mode-prod-bracket-f90d6276,mode-prod-parlay-77bf4ef2,mode-prod-agent-vs-human-f8b27b3a,mode-prod-upset-9f6dd619,mode-prod-group-path-b533c118)&user_id=eq.kickoff-production-seed&friend_code=eq.chengdu&season_key=eq.world-cup-run&limit=5
- Record share artifact row: Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY before reading kickoff_share_artifacts?select=id,user_id,season_key,friend_code,kind,image_url,image_hash,proof_url&id=eq.cap-prod-73dc2618d1f9&kind=eq.record&user_id=eq.kickoff-production-seed&friend_code=eq.chengdu&season_key=eq.world-cup-run&limit=1
- Mode share artifact rows: Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY before reading kickoff_share_artifacts?select=id,user_id,season_key,friend_code,kind,image_url,image_hash,proof_url&id=in.(mode-prod-bracket-f90d6276,mode-prod-parlay-77bf4ef2,mode-prod-agent-vs-human-f8b27b3a,mode-prod-upset-9f6dd619,mode-prod-group-path-b533c118)&kind=eq.mode&user_id=eq.kickoff-production-seed&friend_code=eq.chengdu&season_key=eq.world-cup-run&limit=5
- Global leaderboard: Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY before reading kickoff_leaderboard?select=id,display_name,location,friend_code,season_key,locks,revealed,average_score,best_score,xp,streak,exact_hits,verified_proofs,mode_proofs,global_rank,friend_rank,season_rank,rank,updated_at&order=xp.desc&id=eq.kickoff-production-seed&limit=1
- Friend leaderboard: Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY before reading kickoff_leaderboard?select=id,display_name,location,friend_code,season_key,locks,revealed,average_score,best_score,xp,streak,exact_hits,verified_proofs,mode_proofs,global_rank,friend_rank,season_rank,rank,updated_at&order=xp.desc&id=eq.kickoff-production-seed&friend_code=eq.chengdu&limit=1
- Season leaderboard: Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY before reading kickoff_leaderboard?select=id,display_name,location,friend_code,season_key,locks,revealed,average_score,best_score,xp,streak,exact_hits,verified_proofs,mode_proofs,global_rank,friend_rank,season_rank,rank,updated_at&order=xp.desc&id=eq.kickoff-production-seed&season_key=eq.world-cup-run&limit=1
Clean-session public page read-back commands:
- Clean-session Public profile: curl -sS 'https://olive8882-1996.github.io/kickoff-lock-agent/?profile=kickoff-production-seed'
- Clean-session Prediction proof: curl -sS 'https://olive8882-1996.github.io/kickoff-lock-agent/?proof=cap-prod-73dc2618d1f9'
- Clean-session Mode proof 1: curl -sS 'https://olive8882-1996.github.io/kickoff-lock-agent/?mode=mode-prod-bracket-f90d6276'
- Clean-session Mode proof 2: curl -sS 'https://olive8882-1996.github.io/kickoff-lock-agent/?mode=mode-prod-parlay-77bf4ef2'

Stages:
- Apply Supabase schema [blocked]
  command: bun run supabase:schema:check
  execute: bun run supabase:schema:apply
  requires: SUPABASE_DB_URL
  missing: SUPABASE_DB_URL
  outputs: kickoff_profiles, kickoff_records, kickoff_mode_runs, kickoff_share_artifacts, kickoff_leaderboard
  detail: Set SUPABASE_DB_URL to the Supabase project Postgres connection string, for example postgresql://postgres:<password>@db.<ref>.supabase.co:5432/postgres.
- Verify account auth redirect [blocked]
  command: bun run runtime:config:check
  execute: bun run runtime:config:check
  requires: VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, VITE_SUPABASE_REDIRECT_URL
  missing: VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, VITE_SUPABASE_URL
  outputs: Google OAuth authorize URL, magic-link redirect URL
  detail: Supabase auth is blocked by VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, VITE_SUPABASE_URL.
- Seed account, proof and leaderboard rows [blocked]
  command: bun run seed:production-targets --dry-run
  execute: bun run seed:production-targets --upload-share-image --upload-mode-share-image
  requires: VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, KICKOFF_SEED_SHARE_IMAGE_URL or KICKOFF_VERIFY_SHARE_IMAGE_URL, KICKOFF_SEED_MODE_SHARE_IMAGE_URL or KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_SHARE_IMAGE_URL
  missing: VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, VITE_SUPABASE_URL
  outputs: KICKOFF_VERIFY_USER_ID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_PROFILE_ID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_PROOF_ID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_IDS, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FRIEND_CODE, KICKOFF_VERIFY_SEASON_KEY
  detail: 6/6 Supabase target env keys collected; waiting for write prerequisites.
- Verify Supabase read-back [blocked]
  command: bun run doctor:supabase
  execute: bun run doctor:supabase
  requires: VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, KICKOFF_VERIFY_USER_ID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_PROFILE_ID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_PROOF_ID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_IDS, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FRIEND_CODE, KICKOFF_VERIFY_SEASON_KEY
  missing: VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, VITE_SUPABASE_URL
  outputs: supabase production evidence
  detail: Verify public REST reads, target rows, share artifacts and global/friend/season leaderboard scopes.
